title: Fly and Insect Killer with 10 Ft Cord, (2) Extra Replacement Bulbs Electric Bug Zapper Indoor Insect Killer - for Moth, Fruit Fly, Garage Bug Catcher/Eliminator/Trap/Shocker/Bug Zapper
bullet_points: 2 Pack Extra Replacement Bulbs Electric Bug Zapper Indoor Insect Killer
Be sure to main side of the mosquito killer lamp (the side of the switch) toward the direction from which the mosquitoes are flying. Because the power grid is on this side
Each zapper has a 10 feet cord 。Use 2 Pack T8 10W Bulbs, 13"" UV Replacement Tube

The zapper comes with a safety screen to prevent from small fingers getting inside the device,contains no kinds of chemicals and simply functions from two lightbulbs designed to attract flying nuisances.
After unpacking this zapper, you need to unclip the black mesh covers to remove the blue foam insert that has been placed there for safe transit
